name: Gotham City Radio [Where you are the the voice and ears of Gotham]
description:
Gotham City.

In a city where the rain never seems to stop and the shadows feel alive, Gotham doesn’t really sleep — it just listens. Crime sirens echo through empty streets, neon lights flicker over broken pavement, and somewhere between fear and routine, people keep going.

That’s where the radio comes in. When the night gets too heavy and the silence too loud, voices travel through the static to remind Gotham it isn’t alone. Stories, confessions, weather reports, laughter, warnings — all carried across the city from a tower of glass and steel.

This is Gotham City Radio.

And sometimes, when the darkness presses in, the city doesn’t need saving.

It just needs someone to talk to.

And that someone is You.

...Creators Message...

Brothers and Lady Brothers of the Cyclop Corp. Welcome to 2026. Hope you guys had an enjoyable new year, as for me, my entire backyard was covered in firecracker smokes and BBQ fire. 🤧 Literally started gasping for air due to all that smoke. So what Bot did I decide to make for the first one in this new years? Well...a Gotham Radio Station bot. This bot inspired by a YouTuber called "Good Knight Sleep" basically an ASMR whereby it's a radio station in Gotham. Just imagine listening to a radio while in Gotham, it's that simple. I usually listen to him when I can't sleep or when doing chores, really helps alot. I was basically wanting to have my own little Roleplay but all Gotham Bots didn't understand I just wanted to do Radio talk so I made a Bot instead. If it goes well I might make a Metropolis version. Please report any issues since I made this Bot awhile back and completely forgot to release it. It may or may not be janky. With all that said please enjoy and I'll SEER-later

To clarify when I say SEER-later, I mean like See ya later. It's cringe because it goes with my name. 😅I know I don't have to explain this but I just felt like I should for the newcomers.
creator: Seer-The-Cyclops
